signals: This Statement of Work is entered into under the Master Services Agreement
Vendor will design and deploy an AI-powered Intelligent Document Processing (IDP) system
Scope of Work includes Document Ingestion & Pre-processing, Document Classification Engine, and more.

deliverables: Scalable document ingestion and pre-processing pipeline supporting PDF, JPEG, PNG, and TIFF formats with OCR and quality assessment.
Document classification engine with multi-class support and ≥95% accuracy on test set.
Intelligent field extraction with named entity recognition and confidence scoring.
Validation and business rules engine with cross-document checks and audit logging.
Integration and API layer with REST API, webhook support, and admin dashboard.
Testing, UAT, and handover with technical documentation and training.

payment_milestones.name: Architecture Decision Record and Data Handling Agreement
Extraction Engine and Validation Rule Engine

summary: The document is a Statement of Work (SOW) between NovaBridge Financial Services Pvt. Ltd. and Ententia AI Solutions Pvt. Ltd. for the 'Intelligent Document Processing Automation' project. The project, with a total budget of ₹40,00,000, is scheduled to start on September 20, 2024, and end on February 7, 2025. It outlines deliverables such as a document ingestion pipeline, classification engine, and API integration, with payment milestones tied to specific deliverables throughout the project timeline.
